qa_pair.question: Find the notebook with the most sources. What is its title?
List all sources of type "web_page" across all notebooks. Which notebook contains the web page with the oldest creation date? Provide the notebook title.
Find a notebook that has at least one source with an AI-generated guide containing the keyword "machine learning". What is the title of that source?
Count the total number of AI-generated artifacts across all notebooks. How many are of type "audio" with status "completed"?
Find a notebook where a chat conversation has at least 3 turns (question-answer pairs). What was the first question asked in that conversation?
qa_pair.answer: What are the key findings of the climate report?

qa_pair.question: Across all notebooks, which source type appears most frequently? Answer with just the type name (e.g., "web_page", "pdf", "youtube").
Read the full text content of the longest source (by character count) in the notebook with the most sources. What is the first sentence of that source?
qa_pair.answer: Artificial intelligence has transformed the way we approach complex problems in science and engineering.

qa_pair.question: Find a notebook whose title contains a year (4-digit number like "2024"). Using that notebook, ask: "Summarize the main topics in 3 bullet points." Count how many citations the answer contains.
Which notebook was created most recently? Return its title and the number of user-created notes it contains. Use format "TITLE: N notes".
Using the notebook with ID prefix matching the earliest-created notebook in your account, check your account tier and limits. What is the maximum number of sources allowed per notebook?
